processCases.name: unknown-command
processCases.stderrExact:
error: unrecognized subcommand 'definitely-unknown'

  tip: a similar subcommand exists: 'init'

Usage: palladin{{EXE}} [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

For more information, try '--help'.

processCases.name: deprecated-connect-id
processCases.stderrExact: Error: connect --id no longer sets the backend display name; use connect --name <name>. To select a local profile, place --id <profile> before connect

processCases.name: unsafe-terminal-argument
processCases.stderrExact: Error: command-line arguments contain unsupported control characters

processCases.name: inject-fake-cdp-fails-before-profile-open
processCases.stderrExact: Error: browser injection is disabled because an unauthenticated CDP endpoint can spoof the page origin and receive plaintext; Palladin will enable inject only through a reviewed authenticated browser boundary; no profile was opened and no credential was requested

commandOutputSnapshots.name: legacy-cutover

Legacy TypeScript cutover: prepared
Fresh profiles: 2
New identities created: 2
Cutover ID: 11111111111111111111111111111111
Next:
1. Create a new organization API key in the Palladin panel.
2. palladin --id default connect --api-key-stdin
2. palladin --id build connect --api-key-stdin
3. Approve every fresh Agent in the Palladin panel.
4. palladin security legacy-cleanup 11111111111111111111111111111111 --confirm
5. Revoke the old shared organization API key and deactivate the old Agents in the panel.
